mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_account ( account_no, customer_id, account_name, account_type, product_code, currency, balance, account_status, branch_code, open_date, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES ( #{accountNo}, #{customerId}, #{accountName}, #{accountType}, #{productCode}, #{currency}, #{balance}, #{accountStatus}, #{branchCode}, #{openDate}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT account_no, customer_id, account_name, account_type, product_code, currency, balance, account_status, branch_code, open_date, created_time, updated_time FROM t_account WHERE account_no = #{accountNo}

SELECT account_no, customer_id, account_name, account_type, product_code, currency, balance, account_status, branch_code, open_date, created_time, updated_time FROM t_account WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT account_no, customer_id, account_name, account_type, product_code, currency, balance, account_status, branch_code, open_date, created_time, updated_time FROM t_account WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND account_type = #{accountType} ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT account_no, customer_id, account_name, account_type, product_code, currency, balance, account_status, branch_code, open_date, created_time, updated_time FROM t_account WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND account_status = #{accountStatus} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_account a INNER JOIN t_product p ON a.product_code = p.product_code WHERE a.customer_id = #{customerId} AND a.account_status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.account_level = 'CLASS_I'
